user_query:
I need you to set up a complete project workspace for a new client engagement. Read input/project_brief.md for all details. Then create everything under output/projects/acmeco-website-cro-overhaul/ exactly as follows:

1) Create output/projects/acmeco-website-cro-overhaul/README.md and populate these sections from the brief:
- What: one-sentence description
- Why: the motivation
- Done Criteria: bullet list of all done items
- Deadline: the exact YYYY-MM-DD date from the brief
- Type: Client
- Contact: name + email from the brief
- Deliverables: bullet list copied from the brief

2) Create output/projects/acmeco-website-cro-overhaul/tasks.md with:
- A first line starting with "NEXT ACTION:" that exactly matches the Next Action in the brief
- A checklist of all tasks grouped by phase headings (Planning, Build & Test, Launch) — use markdown checkboxes [ ]

3) Create phase subfolders with their own task lists and notes:
- output/projects/acmeco-website-cro-overhaul/phase-1-planning/tasks.md and notes.md
- output/projects/acmeco-website-cro-overhaul/phase-2-build-test/tasks.md and notes.md
- output/projects/acmeco-website-cro-overhaul/phase-3-launch/tasks.md and notes.md
Place each task in the phase tasks.md that matches its [planning], [build], or [launch] tag in the brief. Use the exact task text from the brief as checklist items (without the tags) in the corresponding phase tasks.md.

4) Create output/projects/acmeco-website-cro-overhaul/notes.md with two top-level headings: "## Decisions" and "## Research" (content can be stubbed).

5) Because this is client work, also create:
- output/projects/acmeco-website-cro-overhaul/communication-log.md with at least one entry referencing the kickoff email
- output/projects/acmeco-website-cro-overhaul/deliverables.md with a checklist ([ ]) for each deliverable listed in the brief

Use the exact project slug acmeco-website-cro-overhaul for folder names and ensure all files are written under output/ as specified.
